name: WpfMaterialCatalog
summary: The WpfMaterialCatalog class represents a group of controls to select materials using the material catalog.

constructors.name: WpfMaterialCatalog
constructors.summary: Initiates a new instance of the control.

constructors.name: WpfMaterialCatalog
constructors.summary: Creates a new instance of the MaterialCatalog and will select the material (if available) in the tree.

params.name: Material
params.doc: The material to be selected in the dialog.

properties.name: ButtonHeight
properties.summary: Gets and sets the height of the button control.

properties.name: ButtonText
properties.summary: Gets and sets the text of the button control.

properties.name: ButtonWidth
properties.summary: Gets and sets the width of the button control.

properties.name: SelectedMaterial
properties.summary: Gets the selected material in the control.

events.name: SelectClicked
events.summary: The SelectClicked event is raised when the Select button is clicked.

events.name: SelectionDone
events.summary: The SelectionDone event is raised when the selection has been done.
